# 

Overview

[](#overview)

Once you are certified by the Clever Partner Engineering team, your next step is to "Go Live" with your app. Going live allows districts to find your app in the App Gallery, request an invitation to connect, and launch a connection with your production app.

* * *

# 

Clever Library

[](#clever-library)

Once you are certified, we will clone your **development** application account to create your **production** application account. You will find your **production** account in the dropdown at the top of your dashboard. Our team will launch your application in the Clever Library. Follow these steps:

1.  **Update Integration**: Use your production app credentials at **Settings**.
2.  **Verify Redirect URIs**: Ensure they are correct and secured with HTTPS at **Settings >> Instant Login**.
3.  **Test Logins**: Test logins for each supported user type with your production configuration. See more here: [Testing - Clever Library SSO](https://dev.clever.com/docs/testing-library)

**Once you're live:**

-   Teachers can install your application in the Clever Library. Learn more: [For Teachers: What is the Clever Library](https://support.clever.com/hc/en-us/articles/360013488672-For-Teachers-What-is-the-Clever-Library-).
-   Your application will be added to Clever’s [application gallery](https://clever.com/app-gallery) within a week.

* * *

# 

Clever Single Sign-On and Clever Secure Sync

[](#clever-single-sign-on-and-clever-secure-sync)

Once you are certified, we will clone your **development** application account to create your **production** application account. You will find your **production** account in the dropdown at the top of your dashboard. A **Go Live** wizard will guide you through the steps to prepare your app for launch.

**Once you've completed the wizard:**

-   Your application will be live on Clever!
-   District administrators can add your application to their dashboard.
-   You can invite districts to connect.
-   Depending on your selections in the **Go Live** wizard, your application may be searchable in the district dashboard and showcased in Clever's [application gallery](https://clever.com/app-gallery).

> 📘
> 
> ### 
> 
> **Note**: If you have an existing SSO integration with Clever and are adding Secure Sync, please reach out to [\[email protected\]](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#a8c1c6dccdcfdac9dcc1c7c6dbe8cbc4cddecdda86cbc7c5).
> 
> [](#note-if-you-have-an-existing-sso-integration-with-clever-and-are-adding-secure-sync-please-reach-out-to-integrationsclevercom)

After becoming Clever certified, your app can start connecting with districts! [Check out this Help Center article](https://support.clever.com/hc/s/articles/215120718?language=en_US) to see how the process works.

* * *

# 

Clever LMS Connect

[](#clever-lms-connect)

Once you are certified, we will enable LMS Connect scopes for your existing production account, and you can begin inviting districts to connect!

You can read more about inviting districts here: [For Application Partners: Sending and receiving Clever LMS Connect requests from districts](https://support.clever.com/hc/s/articles/000001657?language=en_US)
